subject: Continuous Random Variables
question: Let $T$ be a continuous random variable with pdf $f(t) = \begin{cases} \frac{1}{10}e^{-t/10}, & t \ge 0 \\ 0, & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases}$ Define the continuous random variable by $X = \begin{cases} 100 & 0 < T \le 1 \\ 50 & 1 < T \le 3 \\ 0 & T > 3. \end{cases}$ Find $E(X)$.
